subcodes.first_line: O seeker of truth! Thy letter was received, and I accepted the invitation of the United Church. Through God's gracious favours [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب حقیقت نامه شما رسید دعوت کلیسای متحده را قبول نمودم و از الطاف الهیه
subcodes.subjects: @freedom of thought and action, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
